articles.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

articles.title: Trump retreat over Hormuz tolls suggests he is struggling to end Iran war
articles.summary: The abrupt about-face from the US president was the latest twist in a conflict that has now lasted more than four months.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz 'faultline' exposes weakness of the US-Iran deal
articles.summary: Control of the waterway has become a key point of contention between the US and Iran, as a ceasefire deal falters.

articles.title: Russian attacks kill eight as Ukraine hits Black Sea oil tankers
articles.summary: Civilian casualties are reported in four Ukrainian regions, while Kyiv hits 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea.

articles.title: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
articles.summary: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.

articles.title: Kenyan court dismisses Rastafarians' bid to legalise cannabis
articles.summary: The court acknowledged the need for a broader national debate on cannabis policy in Kenya.

articles.title: Venezuela government to launch formal talks with opposition members
articles.summary: The opposition says the aim of the talks is to strengthen the democratic institutions and the electoral system.

articles.title: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
articles.summary: Weak demand domestically and the impact of the Iran war on oil prices overshadowed the country's strong exports.

articles.title: Heatwave prompts Italy's delivery riders to strike for extra rights
articles.summary: Delivery riders in Milan, Bologna and Florence want to protect their health and their wages.

articles.title: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
articles.summary: Ernest Bai Koroma was arrested in 2023 after gunmen broke into an armoury and some jails, freeing inmates.
